query:
SELECT id, name, status FROM sessions;
SELECT sessionId, playerId, totalScore, handsPlayed FROM session_players ORDER BY sessionId, playerId;

SELECT sessionId, playerId, totalScore, handsPlayed FROM session_players ORDER BY sessionId, playerId;
